subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Due to lack of time I write briefly. I beseech the favors of the True One that in the Fountain of Job [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله از عدم فرصت باختصار می پردازم از الطاف حق میخواهم که در چشمه ایوب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
